title: Invisible Nickname
body:
EN: This mod hides the player’s nameplate above the head and in the HUD on the client side. It does not affect the server or other players’ view, only your own interface. Useful for screenshots, streams, and a clean UI.









![The image shows the mod's functionality](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e650aee7b54c9e0049eca474ed794750b3a27925.jpeg)
